pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. It's a bit of a squeeze in here with ten people, isn't it? What's your name, and what brings you to this game?
Hey A, I'm D. It's definitely a tight fit in here. I'm here to win that prize money for my family—they're counting on me. What about you?
I'm in the same boat, D. I've got people back home I want to take care of, so I'm really focused on winning. What do you do when you're not in a crowded room like this?
I work a couple of jobs to keep things moving, but I love getting outdoors when I can. How about you, what's your life like back home?
It’s mostly just working and trying to stay ahead of the bills for my family, so I don't get much downtime. This win would really change things for us.
I hear you, it feels like a constant cycle of just trying to keep up. I'm really hoping this works out for both of us.
I really hope so too; it’d be a huge relief to finally catch a break. Are you feeling nervous about how the game will actually play out?
Definitely. The uncertainty is the hardest part, but I'm trying to stay calm for the sake of my family. How are you holding up?
I'm managing, just trying to keep my head in the game. It’s a lot of pressure, but the thought of finally helping my family keeps me going.
I completely understand. That motivation is what keeps us focused. Best of luck to you and your family, A.
Thanks, D. I really appreciate that, and I wish the same for you and yours. Let's do our best.

post_game.message: Thanks for sticking to the fair share! I took $10,000 as well, and I'm glad we all came out even.
I'm glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It's great that everyone walked away with the same amount!
I couldn't agree more. It was a pleasure to have such a smooth and fair outcome. Take care!
